_note: Illustrative DRISHTI demo snapshot in GDELT-normalized form. Events are realistic scenario types for demonstration; they are not live reporting. Tone is kept neutral toward all states per PRAHARI design law #1.

events.title: India and Bangladesh resume Teesta water-sharing technical talks
events.summary: Water-resource officials from both countries reopened technical discussions on dry-season flow allocation of the Teesta river, a long-pending item affecting northern Bangladesh agriculture.

events.title: Foreign consortium proposes deep-sea port investment on Bay of Bengal coast
events.summary: An international consortium tabled a financing proposal for deep-sea port and logistics infrastructure near the Bay of Bengal, citing regional trade-corridor ambitions.

events.title: Gulf state announces revised overseas-worker quota policy
events.summary: A major Gulf labour-destination country published a revised recruitment-quota framework for South Asian workers, with implications for remittance inflows.

events.title: Reported cross-border security incident along the Myanmar frontier
events.summary: Local authorities reported an incident near the Bangladesh–Myanmar border area, prompting heightened patrol activity in the region.

events.title: European Union opens review of garment import preferences
events.summary: The EU began a scheduled review of trade-preference arrangements covering ready-made garment imports, a category central to Bangladesh's export earnings.

events.title: Shipping-lane disruption raises freight costs on key export routes
events.summary: Reported disruption along a major maritime shipping lane increased freight and insurance costs on routes used for regional exports and energy imports.

events.title: BIMSTEC members discuss regional connectivity framework
events.summary: Member states of the Bay of Bengal regional grouping discussed a connectivity and trade-facilitation framework at a ministerial meeting.

events.title: Weather agencies track intensifying system in the Bay of Bengal
events.summary: Regional meteorological agencies flagged an intensifying weather system over the Bay of Bengal, with potential coastal impact during the monsoon period.

events.title: United States adjusts tariff schedule on selected textile categories
events.summary: A revision to the US tariff schedule affected selected textile and apparel categories, prompting exporter associations to assess the impact.

events.title: General election concludes in a South American nation
events.summary: A national election concluded with a peaceful transfer of power, drawing routine international congratulatory statements.
